item.title: INFRA: Performance Regression Test Suite
item.intent: Performance degrades silently unless measured on every build — automated benchmarks are the only way to keep our performance promises.
item.description: Per D-QA-2. Automated tests that run on every build measuring: cold launch time (D-PERF-1: <1s), keystroke-to-render latency (D-PERF-2: <16ms), scroll FPS (D-PERF-3: 120fps ProMotion), AI first token latency (D-PERF-4: <500ms), memory usage (D-PERF-5: <100MB). A regression that crosses any threshold blocks the build. Uses XCTest performance metrics and Instruments automation.
acceptanceCriteria: Automated benchmarks measure all 5 performance targets on every CI build
Build fails if any performance target is exceeded
Results are logged with historical comparison to detect gradual drift
Tests run on representative device targets (iPhone 15, iPad Pro)
